## Meeting Purpose

[Handoff and overview of SentinelOne and Understory accounts from Sydney to Katya](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Understory is early-stage with minimal content; focus on blog setup and programmatic SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [SentinelOne requires strict security protocols; content creation ongoing with 5 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Katya to focus on content editing initially; Ada handling most client communications/strategy](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Airtable workflow explained for content management and reporting](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)

## Topics

### Understory Account Status

  - [No blog yet; design approved, awaiting WordPress integration (1-2 weeks ETA)](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [One calibration article delivered, no feedback received yet](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=2001.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO strategy in development](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=2072.0)
  - [Key topics: Allbound approach, warm calling (vs cold calling)](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)
  - [Goal: Position as B2B authority, experts appearing in search results](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=2252.0)

### SentinelOne Account Details

  - [Strict security protocols: VDI access, security training required](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=2476.0)
  - [Content creation: 5 articles/week, Cybersecurity 101 focus (not blog)](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=2510.0)
  - [CVE page generation project ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=2552.0)
  - [Front-end design nearly complete, backend integration in progress](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=2984.0)
  - [Goal: SEO-focused, building authority through CVE pages and CS101 content](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=3367.0)

### Content Management Workflow

  - [Airtable used for content tracking and assignment management](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=3512.0)
  - [Keyword research added to 'Keywords' tab, linked to assignments](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=3859.0)
  - [Topic clusters and target keywords interconnected for Looker reporting](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=3970.0)
  - [Published URL tracking for analytics integration](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=3995.0)

### Reporting and Analytics

  - [SEMrush (now Semrush) used for reporting](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=3421.0)
  - [Internal dashboard in Looker Studio pulls data from Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=4013.0)
  - [Limited current data due to minimal published content](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=4538.0)

### Team Dynamics and Communication

  - [Ada handles most client communications and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=4862.0)
  - [Sydney attending Understory and SentinelOne calls currently](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=4895.0)
  - [Katya to potentially take over SentinelOne calls (may need rescheduling)](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=4900.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sydney to complete programmatic SEO strategy for Understory](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
  - [Conduct technical SEO audit for Understory](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=2150.0)
  - [Sydney to create handoff docs with client personalities and key info](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=4808.0)
  - [Katya to begin content editing, sending drafts to Sydney for review](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=4369.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to walk through Airtable workflow with actual data](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=4761.0)
  - [Confirm with Andy about Katya's involvement in client communications](https://fathom.video/share/nuxz8g9UKM36VXoKosydyVLXwb1xkPg_?tab=summary&timestamp=4907.0)
